channel.title: Wordpress on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Wordpress on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Testing from iPhone :)
item.description:
Just trying to test a small post from iPhone ;)

So far so good :P

Comments

Comment by Bal on 2010-04-14 14:26:35 +0530

Acha… te tu dasna c ki tu IPhone lai lya !!

Vadhia tareeka…. facebook to lai ke aapne blog takk… harr paase raula paa ditta.. 🙂

Comment by Sidhu on 2010-04-14 14:41:39 +0530

Karna painda a kaka karna painda a 😛

Comment by Raman on 2010-04-14 16:00:44 +0530

its really gud from i phone..but make sure you dont break it ..as i did..:)
